title: Software Engineer Resume Examples & Guide (2026)
metaDescription: Top Software Engineer resume examples and ATS guide. Copy premium LaTeX template code, find industry-standard ATS skills, and write high-impact bullet points.

summaryExamples.title: Entry Level Software Engineer
summaryExamples.text: Detail-oriented Software Engineering graduate with strong foundations in React, TypeScript, and Node.js. Experienced in building full-stack web applications through academic projects and collaborative open-source contributions. Proven ability to write clean, maintainable code and quickly adapt to modern tech stacks.

summaryExamples.title: Mid Level Software Engineer
summaryExamples.text: Software Engineer with 4+ years of professional experience designing, building, and maintaining production-ready web applications. Expert in React, Next.js, and cloud architectures (AWS). Proven track record of improving site loading speeds by 40% and deploying robust REST APIs that handle millions of requests monthly.

summaryExamples.title: Senior Software Engineer
summaryExamples.text: Lead Software Engineer with 8+ years of expertise architecting microservices and scalable SaaS platforms. Skilled in system design, distributed databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB), and mentoring high-performing engineering teams. Managed cross-functional delivery of a platform serving 500k+ active daily users.

points: Spearheaded design and migration of monolithic architecture to modern Node.js microservices, reducing server overhead costs by 28% and eliminating system downtime.
Architected responsive web dashboards using React, TypeScript, and TailwindCSS, enhancing Core Web Vitals scores and boosting user engagement by 15%.
Designed and implemented secure REST APIs using Express and MongoDB, improving data fetch speeds by 35% through query optimization and database indexing.
Created custom automated CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions, cutting team release deployment cycles from 2 hours down to 10 minutes.
Collaborated with UX designers and Product Managers to define requirements and implement 10+ new features, increasing monthly active users (MAU) by 12%.
Mentored and onboarded 4 junior engineers, conducting weekly code reviews and teaching clean code design principles and test-driven development (TDD).
Led weekly Agile standups and sprint planning sessions, improving team project delivery velocity by 18% over a 6-month period.

faqs.question: Should software engineering resumes be single-page?
faqs.answer: Yes, unless you have 8+ years of experience, a single-page resume is highly recommended. It keeps your achievements concise and easy for recruiters to scan in 6 seconds.

faqs.question: Is LaTeX preferred for software engineer resumes?
faqs.answer: Yes, LaTeX is highly valued in technical fields like software engineering, data science, and academia. It offers precise formatting, looks premium, and modern ATS parse standard text-based PDF compilation beautifully.
